parameters.query:
SELECT json_agg(t) AS result FROM (
  SELECT
    s.agent_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(c.cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE c.log_date = CURRENT_DATE), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS spent_today,
    (s.budget_usd_month / 30.0)::numeric(10,4) AS daily_norm,
    COALESCE(SUM(c.cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE c.log_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS spent_7d,
    s.budget_usd_month
  FROM ai.agent_settings s
  LEFT JOIN ai.cost_log c ON c.agent_name = s.agent_name
  WHERE s.is_active = TRUE
  GROUP BY s.agent_name, s.budget_usd_month
  ORDER BY spent_today DESC
) t;

INSERT INTO ai.hourly_pulse (agent_name, pulse_at, status, summary, metrics)
VALUES (
  'cost_watcher',
  NOW(),
  CASE WHEN $1::boolean THEN 'degraded' ELSE 'idle' END,
  $2,
  $3::jsonb
)
RETURNING id, status;

parameters.text:

' + $('Assess overruns').item.json.overruns.map(o => '• ' + o.agent + ': $' + o.spent + ' (' + o.ratio + 'x norm)').join('
